'''Motesta''' was a small farming settlement near [[Arnthout/Legends|Arnthout]] on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was part of the [[Circle Route]].

==History==
The settlement was the fourth to be made on the desert planet and served as a farming community. The [[Motesta Oasis/Legends|Motesta Oasis]] was located nearby.

{{City-stub}}
